journal_entry.description: Purchase of office desks, computers, and crane-equipped truck
journal_entry.rationale: Office desks and computers are PP&E assets paid in cash. The crane-equipped truck is a vehicle asset for moving operations purchased on account. HST at 13% is recoverable on all purchases. Three asset increases (desks, computers, truck), one asset decrease (cash for desks and computers), and one liability increase (accounts payable for truck).

output_debit_classifier.reason: Three distinct PP&E asset purchases: office desks ($2,000 cash), computers ($3,500 cash), and crane-equipped truck ($250,000 on account). HST at 13% applies to all purchases in Ontario. Total HST = (2,000 + 3,500 + 250,000) × 0.13 = $33,215. Cash paid = 5,500 + 715 = $6,215. Accounts payable = 250,000 + 32,500 = $282,500.
